characters.name: "Sleepy Bill" Burns
characters.description: "Sleepy Bill" BurnsBirthplaceSan Saba,TexasBirthdateJanuary 27, 1880Age30ActorNot applicable"Sleepy Bill" Burnsis an historical figure mentioned in "Nights in Ballygran".Arnold Rothsteinis concerned that having dinner with Burns, a former Chicago White Sox pitcher, could be used to link him to fixing the Baseball World Series. Burns later testified for the prosecution that he acted as a messenger between a group of gamblers and White Sox players (the defendants) to organise the fix. The players were eventually acquitted of the charges but were banned from baseball.

characters.name: Abe Attell
characters.description: Abe AttellBirthplaceSan Francisco, CaliforniaBirthdateFebruary 22, 1884Age36ActorNot applicableAbe Attellis an historical figure mentioned in "Nights in Ballygran".Arnold Rothsteinis concerned that meeting with Attell, a retired boxer, could be used to link him to fixing the Baseball World Series. Attell was once boxing's World Featherweight Champion and befriended Rothstein at this time. In 1920 he was charged with acting as a messenger between Rothstein and White Sox players. He was eventually acquitted of the charges but the players involved were banned from baseball.

characters.name: Abe Attell

characters.name: Abe Klein
characters.description: Abe KleinBirthplaceUnknownAgeUnknownActorBob EngelAbe Kleinis a bar owner in Atlantic City. He is played by co-starBob Engelin "The Ivory Tower". He appears as part of a montage showingNucky Thompson's businesses. Thompson andAldermanDamien Flemingvisit Klein's bar to collect money from him. Klein's bar is known to serve alcohol by members of the Atlantic CityWomen's Temperance Leagueand they discuss this activity at a meeting in "Nights in Ballygran". When AldermanGeorge O'Neillis making collections at the beginning of "Family Limitation" Kleins is crossed out on the list of places he needs to visit implying that he has already made the collection.

characters.name: Albert Anselmi
characters.description: Albert AnselmiBirthplaceMarsala, ItalyBirthdateJuly 15,1883Age46AffiliationChicago OutfitDeathMay 7,1929Albert Anselmiwith partnerJohn Scalisewas one of theChicagoOutfits most successful hitman. The pair are often referred to as "the murder twins".

characters.name: Albert McCauley
characters.description: Albert McCauleyBirthplaceUnknownAgeUnknownActorJeremiah WigginsAlbert McCauley,[1]played byJeremiah Wiggins, is a Hospital chairman atSt. Theresa'sand a minor character in "Resolution". He takes the hospital board on a tour of the facility onDecember 31 1922. He proudly shows off the newEnochandMargaret ThompsonPediatric Annex. He is embarrassed when a female patient has a miscarriage right in front of the board and quickly resumes the tour. ("Resolution")

characters.name: Alexander
characters.description: AlexanderActorTodd DavisAlexander(played byTodd Davis) isJackson Parkhurst's butler. He approaches Parkhurst in his study on the evening of Memorial Day, shortly before Parkhurst is attacked and scalped byJimmy DarmodyandRichard Harrow. Alexander offers Parkhurst cocoa and is shown Parkhurst's new Indian breach cloth. Alexander observes that the cloth "wouldn't cover much".

characters.name: Alfred Gordetsky
characters.description: Alfred GordetskyBirthplaceUnknown,PhiladelphiaresidentBirthdateUnknownAffiliationWaxey GordonDeathKilled byManny Horvitzin July 1921 ("Battle of the Century")ActorScott Burik Gordetsky's death. Alfred Gordetsky, played byScott Burik, is aPhiladelphiagangster working forWaxey Gordon. He is killed while trying to assassinateManny Horvitzon orders from Gordon.

characters.name: Alfred Gordetsky

characters.name: Alma Pastor
characters.description: Alma PastorSeasons4BirthplaceUnknownAgeUnknownDeathChoked byValentin Narcisse's menActorJo ArmenioxAlma Pastor, played by co-starJo Armeniox, is a promiscuous entertainment promoter's wife. The character debuts in thefourth seasonepisode "New York Sour". Pastor lives in New York City, New York and is married to entertainment promoterDickie Pastor. The two often tour with their acts. Dickie is an employee of DrValentin Narcisse. Alma and Dickie visit the Onyx Club in Atlantic City to audition an act for the ownerChalky White. Alma is attracted to Chalky's associateDunn Purnsleyand slips him an explicit drawing to suggest a rendezvous. Dunn takes her to a North Side hotel where they begin to have sex. Dickie surprises them and forces a horrified Dunn to continue at gunpoint as he masturbates. As the cuckolding continues, Dickie's racial taunts enrage Dunn and he knocks the gun away before stabbing Dickie to death with a broken bottle. Terrified, Alma escapes through the window. ("New York Sour")

characters.name: Andrew William Mellon
characters.description: Andrew W. MellonSeasons3,4BirthplacePittsburgh, PennsylvaniaBirthdateMarch 24, 1855Age76 (S5)AffiliationRepublican PartyActorJames CromwellAndrew William Mellon, played byJames Cromwell, is a recurring character in the third season. He is based on the historical person of the same name. He is the Secretary of the Treasury. Mellon was appointed Secretary of the Treasury in 1921 byWarren G. Harding. In addition to being a philanthropist, banker and art collector, Mellon cut taxes, enforcedProhibition, and presided over a period of such unprecedented financial prosperity that he was hailed as the greatest Treasury Secretary since Alexander Hamilton. Attorney GeneralHarry Daughertymentions Mellon as the driving force behind accusations of corruption in his administration. ("Resolution")

characters.name: Andrew William Mellon

characters.name: Angela Darmody
characters.description: Angela DarmodySeasons1,2BirthplaceUnknownBirthdate1898Age23DeathShot byManny Horvitzin July 1921ActorAleksa PalladinoAngela Darmody(played byAleksa Palladino) is a major character isSeason 1andSeason 2. She wasJimmy Darmody's wife, and the mother of his son, Tommy. Angela Darmody, née Ianotti, is a young Italian-American woman. She speaks Italian fluently. She metJimmy Darmodywhile he was studying atPrincetonin 1917, where she was working as a waitress while living with her aunt. The two began a secret relationship with the connivance of Jimmy's roommateCal Widdecombe. However, the day after she told him she was pregnant, Jimmy left to join the US Army and fight inWorld War I. Even though he didn't write to her during the following three years - to the point where she believed he was dead - she managed to make her way to Jimmy's hometown ofAtlantic City, get herself recognized as Jimmy's common-law wife, get a house and raise her sonTommywith financial aid from Jimmy's guardian,Atlantic County TreasurerNucky Thompson, all the while dreaming of becoming a famous painter. When her fiancée returned unexpectedly from the war, however, she gave up her dream in order to play the role of housewife and mother. ("Boardwalk Empire", "Under God's Power She Flourishes", "A Dangerous Maid") Angela makes breakfast for her son,Tommy, and common law husband,Jimmy. Jimmy is annoyed by a news story about boxerJack Dempseyand his reasons for avoiding the draft. Jimmy doubts Dempsey's claims and believes he avoided the draft because he had too much opportunity at home. Angela gives Jimmy a pointed look and he tells her that his acceptance to Princeton was not the same. She urges him to go back to college but he does not think he has the time. She offers to work and he asks what she would do, mentioning that her painting hobby would not provide much income. She asks Jimmy about working withPaddy Ryanand Jimmy is dismissive of the opportunity. He plans to talk toNucky Thompsonabout another job but worries about his lack of skills on leaving the military.

characters.name: Annabelle
characters.description: AnnabelleActorMegan ReinkingAnnabelle, played byMegan Reinking, is the girlfriend of businessmanHarry Prince. She lives in a street populated by girlfriends and mistresses and isMargaret Schroeder's neighbor. She has a young daughterRuby. She is the girlfriend of wealthy businessmanHarry Prince. She lives in a street populated by girlfriends and mistresses in Atlantic City, New Jersey. She has a young daughterRuby.Clara Charltonregularly babysits for Ruby. Annabelle is invited out at the last minute. She goes to see her new neighbor,Margaret Schroederto ask if her babysitter,Clara Charlton, can also care for her daughterRuby. She tells Margaret that the girls often help each other out in this way. Margaret is confused and asks which girls she means. Annabelle says that they are all concubines. She explains that her partner surprised her and that she did not have time to make arrangements. She asks Margaret if the house is the three bedroom and Margaret confirms it. Annabelle says that Nucky must be very keen on Margaret. ("Family Limitation")

characters.name: Arquimedes
characters.description: ArquimedesSeasons5BirthplaceCubaAgeUnknownAffiliationNucky ThompsonDeathShot byPinky Rabinowitzin 1931ActorPaul CalderonArquimedes Cesar Plutarco Gavilan y Ortiz, nicknamedArchie, is a cold and ruthless Cuban enforcer employed byNucky Thompsonas a personal bodyguard. He is played by Puerto Rican actorPaul Calderonand debuts inSeason 5. As Season 5 opens in 1931, Arquimedes has already been serving as Nucky Thompson's personal bodyguard and muscle for an established period of time, assisting Nucky as he conducts business inHavana, Cuba, withSally Wheet. Arquimedes is shown to be a very efficient and ruthless killer despite his calm and stoic demeanor. Although fluent in Spanish and gradually learning English, he rarely speaks, making him an intimidating presence to both Nucky's friends and foes. He cuts the ears off his victims and keeps them as trophies.

("Spaghetti and Coffee") * - Mentioned only

characters.name: Aylesh Rohan
characters.description: Aylesh RohanBirthplaceTemplenoe, County Kerry, IrelandBirthdatec. 1909Age12ActorEmma KenneyAylesh Rohan, played byEmma Kenney, is an Irish immigrant and school pupil. She is the estranged sister ofMargaret Rohan. Her name is a variation of Eilis, the Irish variation of Elizabeth. In 1909, shortly after Aylesh's birth, Margaret became pregnant while unmarried. She refused to tell her family who the father was and they arranged for her to see their priest. He recommended that Margaret be sent to aMagdalene Asylum. Margaret stole money from their mother and used it to buy passage to America. ("Peg of Old") After their mother's death, the eldest sibling,Eamonn, brought his remaining sisters (Nuala,Bethanyand Aylesh) to America. They arrived in 1917. The family lives in an apartment inBrooklyn,New York City. Eamonn found work on a night crew digging subway tunnels. Nuala and Bethany also have manual jobs and Aylesh is still in school. ("A Dangerous Maid", "Peg of Old")

characters.name: Babette
characters.description: BabetteSeasons1,2,3DeathDies due to the explosion of Babette's. (Not confirmed)ActorTracy Lynn MiddendorfBabetteis the hostess and manager of the Atlantic City restaurantBabette's Supper Club. She is played byTracy Lynn Middendorf. Babette works as the hostess and manager at the bustling boardwalk restaurant and nightclubBabette's Supper Clubin Atlantic City. The venue is within walking distance of major hotels like the Ritz Carlton. She keeps a cordial relationship with her regular customers and counts Atlantic City TreasurerNucky Thompsonamong them. Nucky hosts a dinner at Babette's to celebrate Prohibition. She greets him when he arrives and takes his coat. She later parties with his people. Nucky returns to the restaurant two days later to have dinner with his girlfriendLucy Danziger, AldermanJim NearyandNeary's wife. ("Boardwalk Empire")
